creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Is this different from the results of this?

make -C /usr/ports/lang/python39/ all-depends-list | xargs -J % -n 1 make -C % -V PKGNAME

There seems to be a *-depend-list that displays other formats that look good.
Since all-depends-list also just executes the defined variables, it can also have funny controls.

make -C /usr/ports/lang/php82-extensions/ 'ALL-DEPENDS-LIST=${ALL-DEPENDS-FLAVORS-LIST}' all-depends-list
